name: Hermes' Sandals
description: The winged sandals of Hermes grant unnatural speed.
flavor: They fit perfectly, which is suspicious.

name: Golden Laurel
description: A laurel wreath cast in pure Olympian gold.
flavor: Heavier than it looks. Still worth it.

name: Aegis Fragment
description: A shard of Athena's divine shield.

name: Ambrosia Chalice
description: A cup that once held ambrosia, food of the gods.
flavor: Smells faintly of honey and hubris.

name: Ruck of Sisyphus
description: An ancient pack that gets heavier the further you walk.
flavor: Sisyphus would know exactly how you feel.

name: Owl of Athena
description: Athena's owl perches on your estate and keeps watch.
flavor: It judges you constantly. You deserve it.
